label: BANKSapi
description: BaFin-regulated Open Banking platform, licensed as Kontoinformationsdienst (AIS) and Zahlungsauslösedienst (PIS) under PSD2/ZAG. Provides account information, SEPA payment initiation, and AI-powered transaction analytics via a single REST API, aggregating banks, cards, and securities accounts across the DACH region.
